item.title: indeedeng / iwf
item.description:
Desc: iWF is an all-in-one platform for developing long-running business processes. It offers a convenient abstraction layer for utilizing databases, ElasticSearch, message queues, durable timers, and more, with a clean, simple, and user-friendly interface.
